aweme_list.desc: Nationwide - 6x Income Changes..  This is big news for first time buyers..  Changing the criteria from £35,000 income to £30,000 income  This means a sole applicant on £30,000 could potentially borrow upto £180,000 instead of £140,000/£150,000 before hand…  And Joint Applicants upto £300,000 vs £250,000 it might have been before hand…  It also means other lenders might be following soon…  Make sure you like and follow for more  #buyingahome #nationwide #nationwidechanges #affordability #borrowmore #mortgage #buyingahouse
